programme.desc: Despite their storming start to the season, Red Bull haven't won at Albert Park since 2011. Will they break their drought today?

programme.title: F1: 1994 Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: It was one of the most controversial finishes to a season in F1 history. The Benetton of Michael Schumacher takes on the Williams of Damon Hill for the championship in Adelaide.

programme.title: F1: 2002 Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: The 2002 season opener from Albert Park was Mark Webber's debut for Minardi. It was chaos from the opening corner as Ferrari, McLaren and Williams start their championship battle.

programme.title: F1: 2010 Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: Mark Webber starts from the front row with a great opportunity to put an Aussie on the podium. Can teammate Vettel, defending champ Button or championship leader Alonso stand in his way?

programme.title: F1: 1986 Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: A three-way championship showdown in a classic Adelaide season finale. Nigel Mansell leads the championship, but any slip up will open the door for Nelson Piquet or Alain Prost to become World Champion.

programme.title: F1: 2009 Australian Grand Prix
programme.desc: Making its racing debut is Brawn GP. Their driver's performance in practice hints at potential, but can they challenge the established powerhouses on the grid?
